settings.title: Settings
settings.webRemoteAccessDescription: Allow browser connections to this machine; localhost only by default.
settings.listenAddressDescription: Enter loopback IP or LAN IPv4.

marketplace.title: Extensions
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or package
marketplace.extensionNotFound: Extension not found. Please return to the list.
marketplace.alreadyLatest: Already at latest version in catalog
marketplace.goToVersionList: Go to version list to select
marketplace.extensionNotSupported: Extension {{name}}@{{version}} does not support the current Desktop host.

dreams.collectorRunning: Dreams are being collected. New recent trends will appear here soon.
dreams.missingModel: After selecting a collector model, Dreams will start summarizing recent work trends.
dreams.continueWorking: Continue working in the current workspace, and new dream summaries will appear here.
dreams.enableDreams: Enable Dreams to start accumulating recent work trends for the current workspace.
dreams.collectorRunningDetail: The collector is running in the background. More complete dream details will be displayed here when finished.
dreams.noDreamDetail: No dream details to show yet. They will gradually accumulate as you continue working.
dreams.debugEnabled: Debug mode is on. Subsequent collection sessions will be kept as traceable records.
dreams.debugDisabled: Debug mode is off. Only dream summaries are retained.
dreams.debugDetailEnabled: Dream debug logs retain more traceable information for inspecting the collection pipeline.
dreams.debugDetailDisabled: When debug mode is off, only collection artifacts are displayed here.
dreams.noDetails: No more detailed dream records yet.
dreams.scopeCollecting: Recent work trends are being accumulated in the current scope

app.commitAndPushHint: Commit and immediately push to the remote of the current branch.
app.pairingDescription: Enter the pairing code shown on the Desktop settings page.
app.pairingFailed: Pairing failed. Please check the pairing code.
app.compactionDemoDescription: Simulate Compressing → Compaction summary → Compacted reply (not written to session)
app.commitMessagePlaceholder: Commit message; will be auto-generated if left empty
app.commitDialogDescription: Create a Git commit for the current workspace.
app.readOnlySession: Debug session is read-only. Cannot send messages…
app.completeQuestionsAbove: Please complete the questionnaire above first
app.needMoreQuestions: A few more questions need to be confirmed
app.uncommittedChangesCannotSwitch: There are uncommitted changes in the workspace. Cannot switch to “{{branch}}”.
app.discardChangesWarning: After discarding changes, these local modifications will be permanently lost.
app.willSwitchBranch: Will switch to branch “{{branch}}” before sending.
app.uncommittedChangesMayFail: Uncommitted changes detected. Switch may fail.
app.approvalGuidancePlaceholder: Instructions for the model when adjustments are needed
app.rewindComplete: Rewind complete. {{count}} file changes need attention.
app.mergeToDefaultBranchDescription: Merge the current branch into the default branch.
app.mergeWarning: Please ensure changes in the Worktree are committed; the default branch must not have uncommitted changes.
